name: Jason and Sosipater
Dadas, Maximus and Quintilianus
father among the saints Cyril of Turau
kontakia: (Tone 4) By your message you became lights of the world,* O holy Jason and blessed Sosipater.* Save those who cherish your memory.

(Tone 1) You endured agony with courage, and the devil could not prevail over you.* O martyrs equal to the angels in honor,* the whole world honors your sufferings and pains.* By them you have been exalted.
